titleStmt.title: SII 34.264: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 264. Tiruvaranguḷam, Alangudi Taluk, Pudukkottai District. On the south wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Haratīrthēśvara temple.

summary.p: This records a gift of land by purchase for offering puddings to the goddess in the temple of Tiruvaraṅguḷam-uḍaiya-nāyaṉār, by Udaiyañcheydāṉ Bhuvanasiṅgadēvaṉ a mudali of Chēmappiḷḷai. The same person also gave two lamp-stands, a girdle, and a gold fillet. He made provision for burning perpetual lamps from the tax dues collected from the two workshops of blacksmiths (kollar ūdukiṟa ulai) in the village. Besides, he also arranged for lighting some more lamps by assigning a sum of 6000 kāsu (equivalent to 5 achchu) being levied by the araiyas of Valla-nāḍu from the blacksmiths (of the Valla-nāḍu) and a sum of 300 kāsu being paid by the latter for the parisaṭṭam. Reference is also made to the sheep gifted to the temple by Chēmappiḷḷaiyār and the sheep that were presented through pīḍavāri.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tiripuvaṉac cakkaravattikaḷ vīrapāṇṭiya tEvaṟkuyāṇṭu 4 nāyaṉār cEmappiḷ
ḷaiyār mutalikaḷil Utaiyañceytāṉ puvaṉa ciṅkatēvaṉēṉ Uṭaiyār tiruvaraṉkuḷamuṭaiya
nāyaṉār tampirāṭṭiyāṟku piṭṭamutu ceytaruḷa kaḷiyaṉ naṅkaṉ Uḷḷiṭṭār pakkal Ācāriyaṉ va
yalil nīr nilattil tteru paṟṟil puṉceykaḷilum maraṅkaḷilum nālattonṟu Ivva
yalil Acaṟkūṟukoṇṭapaṭiyē Āyirattu Aiññūṟu kācu kuṭuttu koṇṭu Innilattāl piṭṭamutu ceyyum [ pa
ṭi] tirunāyaṟṟukkiḻamai Onṟukku ne nāḻiyāl mukkuṟuṇinellum nāḻippayaṟum Oru tēṅkāyum neyyamu
tu Urikkum pālamutu kuṟuṇikkum viṭṭa pacu nālu Aṭaikkāyamutu pattu Ilaiyamutuirupatu Ippaṭi cantirātittavaṟ ce
lvatākak kallilum cempilum veṭṭikkuṭuttēṉ tampirāṭṭiyāṟku puvaṉa ciṅka tēvaṉēṉ
tirinuntāviḷakku Erikka koṇṭu viṭṭa ciṟukkutti viḷakku Iraṇṭiṉāl Aṟupattoṉpatiṉpalam Uṭaiyāṟ cā
ttiyaruḷa tirumēkalaipoṉ patiṉ Eḻukaḻañcu tiruppaṭṭam poṉ patiṉ kaḻañcu nāyaṉār cēmappiḷḷaiyār civa nāmattā
l Araicakaṇṭarāmaṉ tirinuntāviḷakkum cantiyātīpattukkum niccayittapaṭi tirununtāviḷakku Iraṇṭukku
m kollar Ūtukiṟa Ulaikaḷil Ulai Oṉṟukku koḷḷuṅkācu mūṉṟāka Iraṇṭukku Āṟāka kaṭaiyi nāḻiyāl Uḻakku
neykku Iraṇṭu tirinuntāviḷakku Erikkavum valla nāṭṭu Araiyakaḷ kollar pēr Āṭṭaikkup piṟikkum Accu Aiñcukku Āyirattu
Irunūṟu vilaiyāl kācu Āṟāyiramum tirupaṅkuṉit tirunāḷukkum paricaṭṭattukku tarakkaṭava kācu muṉṉūṟum Āka kācu Āṟāyirattu
muṉṉūṟṟukkum nāḷ Oṉṟukku viḻukkāṭṭuppaṭiyāl vanta kācu patiṉēḻaraikku ceppu nāḻiyāl ney nāḻi Uḻakku tiruviḷa
kku Eḻupattañcukku Iravaiccantikku Otta cāmam koṭṭiṉatu mutal piḷḷaiyār pūcai muṭivāka Iṭakkaṭavatākavum nāya
ṉār cēmappiḷḷaiyār viṭṭa Āṭṭukkum pīṭavāripukunta Āṭṭukkum Aḷakka niccayitta neyyāl nāḷonṟukku tūmpu nāḻiyāl ne
y Uḻakkāḻākkukku tiruviḷakku Irupattu mūṉṟukku tīppāttirattukku tiruvālattaṭṭikkum piṭipantattukkum kaḻitta tiruviḷakku
Aiñcu nīkki viḷakku patiṉ Eṭṭukkum kālaiccanti tuṭaṅki Ucci canti Aḷavum Ittiruviḷakkup patiṉ Oṉṟum Irāvaiccantikku piḷḷai
kaḷ tirukkōyil nālukku tiruviḷakku nālu tirumaṭaippaḷḷit tiruviḷakku Oṉṟum tampirāṭṭiyāṟkum piḷḷaiyāṟkkum tiruviḷakku
Iraṇṭu Ippaṭi cantirātitavaṟ celvatāka kalveṭṭik kuṭuttēṉ puvaṉa ciṅka tēvaṉēṉ
Digital edition of SII 34.264 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
